title: Indian-Style Red Lentil Dal
description: A comforting and flavorful Indian-inspired dish made with red lentils, onions, and aromatic spices. Serve with naan or rice for a satisfying meal.
instructions: Rinse the lentils and drain well.
In a large pot, heat oil over medium heat.
Add the onion, ginger, and garlic and sauté until the onion is translucent.
Add the cumin powder, coriander powder, turmeric, garam masala, and salt. Stir well.
Add the lentils and water to the pot. Bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until the lentils are tender.
Season with additional salt to taste.
Serve hot with naan or rice.
